title: Minecraft 单词卡
description: 保留 mayihaoke 起步词卡，并从 minecraft_words_apk-main 追加一批适合幼小衔接的 Minecraft 核心词卡，用于学习中心和原型玩法共用。

cards.sentence: The world is safe in the new world.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 新世界里的世界很安全。

cards.sentence: I look in the village today.
I run in the village today.
A cat is near the village.
I play in the village today.
I use the sword to collect resources.
I use the pickaxe to collect resources.
A creeper is near the village.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 一只苦力怕在村庄附近。

cards.sentence: I craft in the village today.
The house is safe in the new world.
cards.sentenceTranslation: 新世界里的房子很安全。

cards.sentence: I eat the apple after mining.
